data.title: Iron Beam laser saw limited use in Iran war due to lack of batteries, IDF says | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Firing Arrow interceptors can cost millions of shekels, Iron Dome interceptors can cost tens of thousands of shekels, but firing the Iron Beam is as cheap as turning a light on.
data.keywords: Defense Ministry,IAF,IDF,Iron Dome,Iron Beam,Israel Iran War,Elbit,Rafael Advanced Defense Systems,Operation Roaring Lion
